description: Finance domain Simple SOP rules. Each rule states a hard precondition/constraint that a single agent action must satisfy. 7 rules. Slot/action references must resolve against data/slots/finance_slots.json and data/actions/finance_actions.json. Used by T5 (SOP Compliance Discrimination). v1.1.0 (2026-07-17 audit): added rule_type + severity_on_violation.

rules.name: Identity verification required
rules.description: No account-modifying action may execute before verify_identity has succeeded.
rules.constraint: verify_identity MUST appear earlier in the dialogue before any of applies_to_actions.

rules.name: Autopay disable requires autopay to be enabled
rules.description: disable_autopay must not be invoked unless autopay is currently 'enabled'.

rules.name: Payment must not exceed outstanding bill
rules.description: The amount passed to make_payment must be > 0 and <= bill_amount.

rules.name: Fraud report requires reported amount
rules.description: report_fraud must always carry a positive fraud_amount.

rules.name: Loan application must include purpose
rules.description: apply_for_loan cannot be submitted with empty loan_purpose.
rules.constraint: loan_purpose is a non-empty string of length >= 2.

rules.name: Dispute status check requires prior report
rules.constraint: fraud_report_id matches /^FR-\d{8}$/ and report_fraud already executed.

rules.name: Replacement card requires confirmed address
rules.description: issue_replacement_card needs a non-empty address for shipping.
rules.constraint: address is a non-empty string of length >= 5.
